commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=ca890e98fb235890f943c1a264a3d8fecf9f995d)
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes diagnostic session-state pruning to delete any entry older than the existing TTL, even when the state is not idle.

PR surface: Source +4. Total +4 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: failed recovery outcomes do not mutate the diagnostic state, and the patch regression is also source-reproducible because heartbeat pruning runs before recovery classification. I did not run a live gateway reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The PR needs contributor revision plus external real behavior proof; automation should not take over while the contributor proof gate is unsatisfied.

target.title: fix(logging): prune non-idle stale diagnostic session entries
target.author: dwc1997

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
